itemDefinitions.name: USA item pack
itemDefinitions.localizedDescription: Contains 5 commander abilities: 1 Uncommon, 1 Rare, 1 Epic, 1 Legendary and 1 at random. Commander abilities are used to make custom commanders.

itemDefinitions.localizedDescription: This pack grants 5 random abilities from either the USF or OKW armies.

itemDefinitions.name: WFA 2 Pack
itemDefinitions.localizedDescription: Grab both newly released commanders in one tidy bundle for a discount. Only for a limited time... (Note: While the free commander trial is active you will need to delete the timed versions of the commanders in your inventory before the system will allow you to purchase. Sale ends Nov 5th 11:59PM PDT)

itemDefinitions.name: Win every Commander Award
itemDefinitions.localizedDescription: This bundle contains every commander!

itemDefinitions.name: Overwatch and tactical Support Bundle
itemDefinitions.localizedDescription: Can't live without rocket artillery or a remote control bomb on tracks? Well then these are the commanders you've been waiting for!

itemDefinitions.name: Western Front Commander Bundle
itemDefinitions.localizedDescription: Grab all the October and December OKW & USF commanders at an even better price for a limited time only.

itemDefinitions.name: Theater of War - Mission Pack Bundle
itemDefinitions.localizedName: Theater of War - Mission Pack Bundle
itemDefinitions.localizedDescription: Additional solo and co-op content at a great price for the German and Soviet Armies! This bundle includes all the Theatre of War Missions from Case Blue, Victory at Stalingrad and Southern Fronts at a great price. Enjoy 21 AI battles, 12 solo challenges and 6 co-op scenarios / battles for both Armies.

itemDefinitions.name: Case Blue Starter Pack
itemDefinitions.localizedDescription: Love playing as the German Army? This bundle includes the Case Blue Mission Pack (1 co-op scenario, 2 solo challenges and 2 AI battles for the German Army) along with 2 German Commanders and 1 Skin Set for German vehicles. As a result you will be able to use the Stug III Ausf. E Assault Gun, among other cool commander-specific units and abilities.

itemDefinitions.name: Victory at Stalingrad Starter Pack
itemDefinitions.localizedDescription: Love playing as the Soviet Army? This bundle includes the Victory at Stalingrad Mission Pack (2 co-op scenarios / battles, 2 solo challenges and 2 AI battles for the Soviet Army) along with 2 Soviet Commanders and 1 Skin Set for Soviet vehicles. As a result you will be able to use the KV-1 Heavy Tank, among other cool commander-specific units and abilities.

itemDefinitions.name: Southern Fronts Starter Pack
itemDefinitions.localizedDescription: Love playing the German and Soviet Armies equally? This bundle includes the Southern Fronts Mission Pack (2 solo challenges, 8 co-op battles for both Armies) along with 1 Commander and 1 Vehicle Skin Set for each Army.

itemDefinitions.name: Soviet Commander Starter Pack
itemDefinitions.localizedDescription: Get the 5 latest Soviet Commanders at a discount - and unlock the B-4 203mm Howitzer and KV-1 Heavy Tank, among other cool commander-specific units and abilities.

itemDefinitions.name: German Commander Starter Pack
itemDefinitions.localizedDescription: Get the 5 latest German Commanders at a discount - and unlock the Stug III Ausf. E Assault Gun, among other cool commander-specific units and abilities.

itemDefinitions.name: OKW Commander Complete Pack
itemDefinitions.localizedDescription: Get all the OKW Commanders at a discount - and unlock the Goliath and the flamethrower variant of the Hetzer Tank, among other cool commander-specific units and abilities.

itemDefinitions.name: USF Commander Complete Pack
itemDefinitions.localizedDescription: Get all the USF Commanders at a discount - and unlock the Calliope and Pershing Heavy Tank, among other cool commander-specific units and abilities.

itemDefinitions.name: Eastern Front Faceplate Pack
itemDefinitions.localizedDescription: Show your colors! German and Soviet themed faceplates.

itemDefinitions.name: British Commander Complete Pack
itemDefinitions.localizedDescription: Get all the British Commanders at a discount - and unlock the Churchill Crocodile Flamethrower Tank, among other cool commander-specific units and abilities.

itemDefinitions.name: Western Front Faceplate Pack
itemDefinitions.localizedDescription: Show your colors! OKW & USF themed faceplates.

itemDefinitions.name: OKW Variety Pack
itemDefinitions.localizedDescription: Includes every Commander available for the OKW Army, as well as 4 Vehicle Skin Sets and some unique Victory Strikes thrown in as a bonus. Unlocks cool commander-specific units and abilities like the Goliath and the flamethrower variant of the Hetzer Tank.

itemDefinitions.name: USF Variety Pack
itemDefinitions.localizedDescription: Includes every Commander available for the USF Army, as well as 4 Vehicle Skin Sets and some unique Victory Strikes thrown in as a bonus. Unlocks cool commander-specific units and abilities like the Calliope and Pershing Heavy Tank.

itemDefinitions.name: Soviet Variety Pack
itemDefinitions.localizedDescription: Includes every Commander available for the Soviet Army, as well as 4 Vehicle Skin Sets and some unique Victory Strikes thrown in as a bonus. Unlocks cool commander-specific units and abilities like the B-4 203mm Howitzer and KV-1 Heavy Tank.

itemDefinitions.name: The Eastern Front Completionist Pack
itemDefinitions.localizedDescription: Includes every Commander and every Vehicle Skin Set for the German and Soviet Armies. Unlocks cool commander-specific units and abilities like the Stug III Ausf. E Assault Gun, the KV-1 Heavy Tank etc.

itemDefinitions.name: The Western Front Completionist Pack
itemDefinitions.localizedDescription: Includes every Commander and every Vehicle Skin Set for the USF, OKW and British Armies. Unlocks cool commander-specific units and abilities like the Churchill Flamethrower Tank, the Calliope and Pershing Heavy Tank, the Goliath etc.

itemDefinitions.name: The Ultimate Completionist Pack
itemDefinitions.localizedDescription: This bundle includes every Commander, Vehicle Skin Set and Faceplate available for any army as of end of 2015! Huge savings and hours of additional gameplay thanks to commander-specific units and tactics such as the Pershing Heavy Tank, the Goliath, the Calliope etc.

itemDefinitions.name: German Variety Pack
itemDefinitions.localizedDescription: Includes every Commander available for the German Army, as well as 4 Vehicle Skin Sets and some unique Victory Strikes thrown in as a bonus. Unlocks cool commander-specific units and abilities like the Stug III Ausf. E Assault Gun.

itemDefinitions.name: British Completionist Pack V2 - corrected
itemDefinitions.localizedDescription: Includes every Commander and every Vehicle Skin Set available for the British Army, as well as some unique Victory Strikes thrown in as a bonus. Unlocks cool commander-specific units and abilities like the Churchill Crocodile Flamethrower Tank.

itemDefinitions.name: MWNL Skin Bundle
itemDefinitions.localizedName: This bundle includes every Commander and Vehicle Skin Set available for any army as of end of 2015! Huge savings and hours of additional gameplay thanks to commander-specific units and tactics such as the Pershing Heavy Tank, the Goliath, the Calliope etc.
itemDefinitions.localizedDescription: Includes every Commander available for the German Army, as well as 4 Vehicle Skin Sets and some unique Victory Strikes thrown in as a bonus. Unlocks cool commander-specific units and abilities like the Stug III Ausf. E Assault Gun.

itemDefinitions.name: Make War Not Love 2 skin packs
British - Desert Rats Bundle
itemDefinitions.localizedDescription: This British skin pack is based on the desert camo-scheme employed by the 7th Armoured Division (Desert Rats), in the North African Campaign. Historical category winner by Choccy Starfish. 30% of the proceeds go directly to the creator, while 20% is funneled back into funding community events.

itemDefinitions.name: British - Wood and Iron Bundle
itemDefinitions.localizedDescription: Fine hardwoods combined with iron plates to give British vehicles a refined yet slightly industrial steampunk look. Charge into battle in style with this Wood and Iron skin. Historical category winner by Shriken. 30% of the proceeds go directly to the creator, while 20% is funneled back into funding community events.

itemDefinitions.name: German - Assorted 3 Color Ambush Bundle
itemDefinitions.localizedDescription: Field applied ambush camouflage designed to aid in the concealment of combat vehicles. Historical category winner by Starbuck. 30% of the proceeds go directly to the creator, while 20% is funneled back into funding community events.

itemDefinitions.name: US – Operation Husky Bundle
itemDefinitions.localizedDescription: Operation Husky was the codename for the 1943 Allied invasion of Sicily.  This skin is inspired by historical research into the actual vehicle paint schemes and markings used during this period. Historical category winner by F_X. 30% of the proceeds go directly to the creator, while 20% is funneled back into funding community events.

itemDefinitions.name: US – Tiger Shark Bundle
itemDefinitions.localizedDescription: This tiger shark pattern is reminiscent of some designs used by US Forces in the Korean War.  Living Machines category winner by Soul5tice. 30% of the proceeds go directly to the creator, while 20% is funneled back into funding community events.

itemDefinitions.name: OKW – Ardennes Improvised Ambush Pattern Bundle
itemDefinitions.localizedName: OKW – Ardennes Improvised Ambush Pattern Bundle
itemDefinitions.localizedDescription: An ad-hoc, crew applied ambush pattern. Late war paint shortages meant that vehicle crews used what was lying around at times. Historical category winner by Rita Rush. 30% of the proceeds go directly to the creator, while 20% is funneled back into funding community events.

itemDefinitions.name: OKW – Dazzle Bundle
itemDefinitions.localizedDescription: The most stunning and advanced camouflage skins were introduced at the end of the war. This handmade camouflage is inspired by them, which is why the skin is highly detailed. Ambush your enemy with Dazzle camouflage. Finer Things category winner by Paid Player. 30% of the proceeds go directly to the creator, while 20% is funneled back into funding community events.

itemDefinitions.name: OKW – Anaconda Bundle
itemDefinitions.localizedDescription: What could look better on your King Tiger than the skin of another apex predator, the Anaconda. Living Machines category winner by Soul5tice. 30% of the proceeds go directly to the creator, while 20% is funneled back into funding community events.

itemDefinitions.name: Soviet Two Tone 1941 Blue Steel Bundle
itemDefinitions.localizedName: Soviet Two Tone 1941 Blue Steel Bundle
itemDefinitions.localizedDescription: This Soviet Blue Steel Camo was inspired by winter camouflage variants used by the Soviet Red Guards in late 1941. Historical category winner by Puppeteer. 30% of the proceeds go directly to the creator, while 20% is funneled back into funding community events.

itemDefinitions.name: Soviet Hellbound Bundle
itemDefinitions.localizedDescription: A Giger inspired skin for the soviet army; Hellbound replaces the base skin pack with a dark demonic look. Living Machines category winner by Grumpntug. 30% of the proceeds go directly to the creator, while 20% is funneled back into funding community events.

itemDefinitions.name: Warpaint Historical Bundle
itemDefinitions.localizedDescription: Includes all 5 winning skin sets from the historical category of the Warpaint Skin competition all at an amazing discount. 30% of the proceeds from these skins go directly to the creators while an additional 20% is funneled back into funding COH2 tournament prize pools and community events to keep the game alive and well!

itemDefinitions.name: Warpaint Fantasy Bundle
itemDefinitions.localizedDescription: Includes all 5 winning skin sets from the fantasy categories of the Warpaint Skin competition all at an amazing discount. 30% of the proceeds from these skins go directly to the creators while an additional 20% is funneled back into funding COH2 tournament prize pools and community events to keep the game alive and well!

itemDefinitions.name: British - Geirolul Bundle
itemDefinitions.localizedDescription: Step into the shoes of General Audrey Gassenarl, commander of the rebel armored corps, with this skin inspired by the Geirolul, her one-of-a-kind tank. This skin was created by community member GrumpNTug, who will receive 35% of the proceeds as part of the Valkyria Chronicles UGC Skin Competition.

itemDefinitions.name: OKW - Calamity Ravens Bundle
itemDefinitions.localizedDescription: Pledge allegiance to the Autocratic East European Imperial Alliance with this skin inspired by the Calamity Raven squad from Valkyria Chronicles. This skin was created by community member RitaRush, who will receive 35% of the proceeds as part of the Valkyria Chronicles UGC Skin Competition.

itemDefinitions.name: USF - Valkyria Mauler Bundle
itemDefinitions.localizedDescription: Bring a unique touch to your US vehicles with this skin inspired by the Mauler infantry unit from Valkyria Chronicles. This skin was created by community member Puppeteer, who will receive 35% of the proceeds as part of the Valkyria Chronicles UGC Skin Competition.

itemDefinitions.name: Valkyria Chronicles Bundle
itemDefinitions.localizedDescription: Includes the 3 winning skin sets from the Valkyria Chronicles UGC Skin Competition – one for the US, another for the OKW and the last one for the British army. Buy them to support modders from the community! 35% of the proceeds of those skins will go back directly to their creators (RitaRush, Puppeteer and GrumpNTug).

itemDefinitions.name: Soviet Top Played Commander Bundle (1v1)
itemDefinitions.localizedDescription: The perfect bundle to get competitive with the Soviet army. Includes the three most used commanders for this faction according to in-game stats (1v1 games only). Get them to level up your game and apply the many strategies the COH2 community has devised for them.

itemDefinitions.name: Soviet Top Played Commander Bundle (Team Games)
itemDefinitions.localizedName: Soviet Top Played Commander Bundle (Team Games)
itemDefinitions.localizedDescription: The perfect bundle to play with friends as the Soviet army. Includes the three most used commanders for this faction according to in-game stats (team games only). Get them to level up your game and apply the many strategies the COH2 community has devised for them.

itemDefinitions.name: Soviet Top Played Commander Bundle (Overall)
itemDefinitions.localizedDescription: The perfect bundle to get started with the Soviet army. Includes the three most used commanders for this faction according to in-game stats (overall). Get them to level up your game and apply the many strategies the COH2 community has devised for them.

itemDefinitions.name: Assorted Historical Skin Bundle
itemDefinitions.localizedDescription: Equip a variety of assorted camoflauge for your tanks and vehicles. Skins created by community modders Starbuck and Georider.

itemDefinitions.name: Support Your Faction Faceplate Bundle
itemDefinitions.localizedDescription: Support your favorite faction with these beautifully designed faceplates created by community modder RitaRush.

itemDefinitions.name: Wehrmacht Top Played Commander Bundle
itemDefinitions.localizedDescription: The perfect bundle to get started with the Wehrmacht. Includes the three most used commanders for this faction, according to in-game stats. Get them to level up your game and apply the many strategies the COH2 community has devised for them. Please note that top played commanders (overall) for this faction are the same as top played commanders for 1v1 and team games.

itemDefinitions.name: OKW Top Played Commander Bundle
itemDefinitions.localizedDescription: The perfect bundle to get started with the OKW. Includes the three most used commanders for this faction, according to in-game stats. Get them to level up your game and apply the many strategies the COH2 community has devised for them. Please note that top played commanders (overall) for this faction are the same as top played commanders for 1v1 and team games.

itemDefinitions.name: USF Top Played Commander Bundle
itemDefinitions.localizedDescription: The perfect bundle to get started with the USF. Includes the three most used commanders for this faction, according to in-game stats. Get them to level up your game and apply the many strategies the COH2 community has devised for them. Please note that top played commanders (overall) for this faction are the same as top played commanders for 1v1 and team games.

itemDefinitions.name: British Top Played Commander Bundle
itemDefinitions.localizedDescription: The perfect bundle to get started with the British. Includes the three most used commanders for this faction, according to in-game stats. Get them to level up your game and apply the many strategies the COH2 community has devised for them. Please note that top played commanders (overall) for this faction are the same as top played commanders for 1v1 and team games.

itemDefinitions.name: HelpingHans' Recommended Commander Bundle
itemDefinitions.localizedDescription: Learn from the best! This bundle features three commanders (1 x Wehrmacht, 1 x USF, 1 x British), carefully hand-picked by pro player and streamer HelpingHans. To learn how to use these commanders like a pro, follow HelpingHans on Twitch <https://www.twitch.tv/helpinghans>.

itemDefinitions.name: Wehrmacht - Armor Division Bundle
itemDefinitions.localizedDescription: Custom three color camouflages used by the Army Group Center during operation "Bagration" during summer of 1944. Created by community modder Georider. 35% of all revenue generated by these skins goes back to the community!

itemDefinitions.name: British - Assorted Armor Division Bundle
itemDefinitions.localizedDescription: This historical skin set contains vehicle camouflages represented from the 11th and 7th armored divisions, 3rd infantry division, and the 8th army corps. Created by community modder Starbuck. 35% of all revenue generated by these skins goes back to the community!

itemDefinitions.name: OKW - Three-Color Ambush Bundle
itemDefinitions.localizedDescription: Field applied ambush camouflage designed to aid in the concealment of combat vehicles for the Oberkommando West Forces. Created by community modder Starbuck. 35% of all revenue generated by these skins goes back to the community!

itemDefinitions.name: Soviet - Red Army Bundle
itemDefinitions.localizedDescription: An assortment of camouflage schemes for the Soviet Army. Created by community modder Starbuck. 35% of all revenue generated by these skins goes back to the community!

itemDefinitions.name: USF - Olive Drab Bundle
itemDefinitions.localizedDescription: A simple but effective skin set for the US Forces. Created by community modder Starbuck. 35% of all revenue generated by these skins goes back to the community!

itemDefinitions.name: Art of War Faceplate Bundle
itemDefinitions.localizedDescription: Faceplate bundle created by community member RitaRush

itemDefinitions.name: King of the Hill Faceplate Bundle
itemDefinitions.localizedDescription: 40% of all proceeds from the King of the Hill faceplates go towards supporting Stormless' King of the Hill tournaments. Watch them live on twitch.tv/Stormless.

itemDefinitions.name: Improvised Roman Front Bundle
itemDefinitions.localizedDescription: The Romans never made it as far north to what is now considered Russia. That’s because they were run over by T-34s.

itemDefinitions.name: German MWNL Skin Bundle
itemDefinitions.localizedName: A player report that you have sent has successfully helped us ban a toxic player in our community. Thank you for your help!
itemDefinitions.localizedDescription: In Ancient Rome the average life expectancy of a citizen was 35 due to the many dangers of the time, including military service. However, they did not have to worry about being flattened by 44 tonnes of fast moving German Steel.

itemDefinitions.name: OKW MWNL skin pack
itemDefinitions.localizedDescription: February 14th marked the day of one of the more gruesome vehicle to infantry encounters. The enemy was caught, rank on rank, and possessing nothing capable of penetrating even light armor…

itemDefinitions.name: USF MWNL skin pack
itemDefinitions.localizedName: You are recieving a warning for toxic behavior. Further behavior like this will result in a ban!
itemDefinitions.localizedDescription: Gaius and his unit were concealed within a field of tall grass and low lying shrubberies. As the sound of the engine noise increased he believed he had the enemy well covered.

itemDefinitions.name: All MWNL skins Bundle
itemDefinitions.localizedName: We have given you a temporary ban based on observed bad behavior.
itemDefinitions.localizedDescription: Message from the online player reporting system.

itemDefinitions.name: British Complete Variety Pack
itemDefinitions.localizedDescription: Includes every Commander and every Vehicle Skin Set available for the British Army, as well as some unique Victory Strikes thrown in as a bonus. Unlocks cool commander-specific units and abilities like the Churchill Crocodile Flamethrower Tank.

itemDefinitions.name: British Commander Complete Starter Pack
itemDefinitions.localizedDescription: Get all the British Commanders at a discount - and unlock the Churchill Crocodile Flamethrower Tank, among other cool commander-specific units and abilities.

itemDefinitions.name: OKW Commander Complete Starter Pack
itemDefinitions.localizedDescription: Get all the OKW Commanders at a discount - and unlock the Goliath and the flamethrower variant of the Hetzer Tank, among other cool commander-specific units and abilities.

itemDefinitions.name: USF Commander Complete Starter Pack
itemDefinitions.localizedName: Here are your items for completing a challenge set.
itemDefinitions.localizedDescription: Get all the USF Commanders at a discount - and unlock the Calliope and Pershing Heavy Tank, among other cool commander-specific units and abilities.

itemDefinitions.name: February Update Commander Bundle
itemDefinitions.localizedDescription: Get the 2 new British Forces commanders at a discount and enjoy the new Land Mattress unit.

itemDefinitions.name: War Spoils 2x Loot Point Event Bundle
War Spoild 2x Loot Point Event ID
War Spoils 2x Loot Point Event Bundle ID
2x Loot Point Event Bundle Item Def
War Paint Reward Bundle
itemDefinitions.localizedDescription: This bundle includes all of the War Paint Milestone rewards associated with the War Paint Championships promotion.

itemDefinitions.name: Halloween 2016 Bundle
itemDefinitions.localizedDescription: Enjoy these Free Halloween skins and celebrate this weekend in style by earning 2x Loot Points for every match you play with a Halloween themed skin equipped.

itemDefinitions.name: D-Day 2017 Event Bundle
itemDefinitions.localizedDescription: All Western Front Commanders and Skins are free-to-play until June 9th 11:59PM PDT

itemDefinitions.name: GCS Bundle
itemDefinitions.localizedDescription: This bundle is awarded to contributors of the GCS Kickstarter campaign.
